rationale_top3: Nature & surroundings (14 points) - Good natural environment and scenery around the park Value for money (11 points) - Reasonable pricing for the facilities and location offered Entertainment options (10 points) - Basic entertainment facilities available for families
rationale_honourable: Location accessibility (9 points) - Convenient position in Batemans Bay with reasonable access to local attractions and amenities
water_fun: Coastal location provides beach access, though on-site water facilities appear limited
kids_play: Basic entertainment facilities available with moderate scoring, suggesting standard playground equipment but limited organized activities
pet_detail: Pet-friendly with moderate scoring (8 points), indicating pets are welcome with standard restrictions likely in place
best_for: Budget-conscious families and couples looking for a simple coastal holiday base with natural beauty
